meaning: n.姣旇緝,瀵圭収,姣斿柣,姣旇緝鍏崇郴
examples: I enclose the two plans for comparison.
It is demonstrably an unfair comparison.
That comparison isn't as wide of the mark as it seems.
No doubt I am sentimentalising the orderliness of written letters by comparison with emails.
Such tiny changes might seem trifling in comparison with the multibillion-dollar nature of the problem.
